TOXIC TORT/ENVIRONMENT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMER, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT VANDOR LLC DOES 1 TO 150 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-30-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-15-2013
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VANDOR LLC
AMENDED POS TO VANDOR LLC 'S ANSWER TO PLTFS COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VANDOR LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE & MR. MAHONEY ARE BOTH MEMBERS OF THE INN OF COURT. SHE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR HER RECUSAL TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SETTLEMENT MEETS THE CRITERIA OF THE HEALTH & SAFTEY CODE. THE REIMBURSEMENT OF ATTORNEYS FEE, COST AND THE CIVIL PENALTY ARE REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976
